title: FullDocumentProvenanceTraceQuery
description: Input query schema for Use Case 2: Full-Document Provenance Trace. Given a document_id and optional group_by, return all index records for that document with provenance chain.

document_id.description: Document identifier from P94 promoted index (e.g., tsa23_2012_23tsdp12). Must match a value present in the target corpus.

group_by.description: How to group output records. 'none' returns flat array sorted by page_anchor; 'audit_status' groups by audit status; 'model_lane' groups by model lane.
